For Lebutha

a letter from the heart

My dearest Boipelo,

I don't always say it out loud the way I should — you know me, I'd rather debug code at midnight than admit my feelings in full sentences. But today I'm putting it all into words, just for you.

From the moment I got to know you, something shifted in me. You walked into my world and suddenly the things I used to find ordinary felt extraordinary — because everything is better when you're part of it.

You are smart, beautiful, and wonderfully yourself — and I mean every part of that. Your laugh is my favourite sound. Your presence is my favourite place. And somehow, being around you makes me want to be a better version of me.

How are you feeling right now, babe? 🌸

🌹

us. 🖤

Some moments don't need a filter. This one is already perfect.

🌟
us, again. 🌟

Every picture with you is my favourite picture.

🌸

I choose you — not just on the easy days, but on every kind of day. I want to be your safe place, your person, your nerdy boyfriend who somehow got incredibly lucky.

Thank you for being you, Lebutha. The world is genuinely a better place because you're in it — and my world especially so. I love you the way a nerd loves a good dataset — completely, obsessively, and with absolutely zero intention of letting go. 🤓💗

Always & forever yours,

Your Nerdy Boyfriend 🤓💌
"I choose you, every single day — not because I have to, but because choosing you is the easiest and best decision I ever make."
— written especially for Boipelo Lebutha ♡
